# @pondoknusa/core

Pondoknusa application kernel, providers, and facades

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/core
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/core`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/core) |
| Category | Kernel & HTTP |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
